title: iseilema calvum
intro: Iseilema calvum, also known as the "bushy one-sided grass", is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Iseilema calvum include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healing agent. Herbal preparations of Iseilema calvum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
